Thesis: NVIDIA-backed, L&T-validated (~21% stake) Indian GPU neocloud riding a 50%+ CAGR sector tailwind and India's data-residency laws, but FY26 closed at a net loss on its own capex depreciation, ROE/ROCE are negative, promoter holding has nearly halved on dilution, and CMP already discounts close to our Acceleration-case scenario rather than Base case — real business, rich price.
